DeliveryType.description: The consultancy delivery model (ADR-0026), mirroring SourcingAttribution's shape.
DeliveryType.title: DeliveryType

Money.description:
A currency amount that cannot exist without an explicit currency and a reference to the
assumption register that justifies it (Methodology §10, ADR-0002 compliance test).

A lever NPV or remediation cost is only meaningful under stated assumptions; a `Money`
without an ``assumption_register_ref`` is not constructible.

amount_minor.description: Amount in integer minor units (e.g. pence).
amount_minor.title: Amount Minor

assumption_register_ref.description: Reference to the assumption-register entry that justifies this figure. Mandatory: currency claims are never made without stated assumptions (Methodology §10).
assumption_register_ref.title: Assumption Register Ref

Money.title: Money

PaymentStatus.description: Lifecycle of a commission line: earned (pending) → invoiced to Bruntsfield → paid out.
PaymentStatus.title: PaymentStatus

SourcingAttribution.description:
Who sourced the deal. v7 axes are SELF / FIRM; the two legacy values are retained for
historical lines and fold into FIRM for v7 pricing (ADR-0026).
SourcingAttribution.title: SourcingAttribution

description:
One earned commission — immutable once recorded. Provenance (tier/attribution/rate_ref/
base_value for legacy; product_id/delivery_type/contract_year/window_end for v7) is stamped at
record time, so a later rate change is never retroactive; the line reproduces from its own
fields. `payment_status` is the one mutable field (its forward-only lifecycle).

base_value.description: The contract value the rate was applied to.

client_paid_on.description: Pay-when-paid anchor: the date the client cash was received.
client_paid_on.title: Client Paid On

content_hash.description: SHA-256 immutability seal over the line.
content_hash.title: Content Hash

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id

source_attribution_id.description: The recovery-fee attribution this line was claimed from, if any.
source_attribution_id.title: Source Attribution Id

window_end.description: Stream-A window cut-off; past it the product rate is zero.
window_end.title: Window End

title: CommissionLine
